{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blue Titan Knight
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue Titan Knight]] is a role or title within the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
